messages.subject: [R-jobs] Continuum Analytics - Anaconda R Packaging Engineer job opening
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Continuum Analytics - Anaconda R Packaging Engineer job opening
messages.body_plain:
Continuum Analytics is searching for a motivated, bright recent graduate or
early career professional to join the Anaconda team that develops the
popular, free cross platform Python & R distribution for large-scale data
processing, predictive analytics, and scientific computing. Anaconda
includes hundreds of the most popular Python and R packages for Linux,
Windows, and MacOSX.  The Anaconda team also actively develops the
innovative open source package manager conda that is the primary interface
for managing Anaconda installations. This particular position will focus on
building, testing and maintaining the R packages*.*  Come join us and help
make Anaconda and conda even better!
https://boards.greenhouse.io/continuum/jobs/101272#.Vhg1NNbFtp8

*_______________________________________________*

*Melissa Crijns*
*Director Talent Acquisition*
512-774-9025
mcrijns at continuum.io


<https://www.linkedin.com/pub/melissa-crijns/0/131/b76>

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
